prompt: Generate an inventory stock tracking system with warehouse logins.

constraints: SKU codes must follow ISO-9001 inventory structure.

assumptions.assumption: Stock levels decrement on sales API call

clarification_questions.question: Do you require barcode scanner support?

confidence_explanation: Lack of clearly defined business operational rules.
Moderate structural confidence; proceed with assumptions.
